RECOVER FROM APPELLANT OLSON, KATHRYN $2,495.51 PRINCIPAL, $215.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,710.51, GOLDEN STATE WINDOWS, INC., SHALL IMMEDIATELY DELIVER TO KATHRYN OLSON THE FOUR WINDOWS SPECIFIED IN THE CONTRACT OF THE PARTIES. CROSS CLAIM JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF GOLDEN STATE WINDOWS INC., AND AGAINST KATHRYN OLSON IN THE AMOUNT OF $0.00.
